---
title: "linear_kernel"
generated: true
description: "Parameterised linear kernel: `X0 @ theta @ X1.T`."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.linalg.kernel`](../nitrix-linalg-kernel.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:linear_kernel -->
```python
linear_kernel(X0: Float[Array, '... n d'], X1: Optional[Float[Array, '... m d']] = None, *, theta: Optional[Num[Array, '... d']] = None) -> Float[Array, '... n m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:linear_kernel -->
Parameterised linear kernel: `X0 @ theta @ X1.T`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:linear_kernel -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X0` | `Float` | `...` Ă— `n` Ă— `d` | â€” | Sample tensors `(..., n, d)` and `(..., m, d)`. If `X1 is None`, uses `X0` (self-kernel; result is `(..., n, n)`). |
| `X1` | `Optional[Float[Array, '... m d']]` | â€” | `None` | Sample tensors `(..., n, d)` and `(..., m, d)`. If `X1 is None`, uses `X0` (self-kernel; result is `(..., n, n)`). |
| `theta` | `Optional[Num[Array, '... d']]` | â€” | `None` | Optional inner-product weights. `None` -> standard Euclidean; vector `(..., d)` -> diagonal Mahalanobis; matrix `(..., d, d)` -> full Mahalanobis. |

**Returns** `Float` â€” shape `...` Ă— `n` Ă— `m`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:linear_kernel -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks â€” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **176.8 Âµs** (median, L4); up to **172Ă— faster** than `sklearn.linear_kernel`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_LINEAR_KERNEL.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=2048,d=64 | `cupy.linear_kernel` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=2048,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 3.16 ms / 6.90 ms | 120.10 ms | 671 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.035Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=2048,d=64 | `sklearn.linear_kernel` | ok | 11.80 ms / 15.24 ms | 17.23 ms | 671 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.035Ă—tol | 3.74x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=2048,d=64 | `cupy.linear_kernel` | ok | 86.9 Âµs / 88.0 Âµs | 64.96 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.035Ă—tol | 0.52x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=2048,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 167.7 Âµs / 176.8 Âµs | 228.53 ms | 105.38 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.035Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=2048,d=64 | `sklearn.linear_kernel` | ok | 20.47 ms / 41.75 ms | 44.14 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.035Ă—tol | 122.05x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=4096,d=64 | `cupy.linear_kernel` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=4096,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 37.01 ms / 45.30 ms | 156.49 ms | 851 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.048Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=4096,d=64 | `sklearn.linear_kernel` | ok | 69.53 ms / 85.98 ms | 84.95 ms | 831 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.048Ă—tol | 1.88x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=4096,d=64 | `cupy.linear_kernel` | ok | 286.1 Âµs / 293.3 Âµs | 63.12 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.048Ă—tol | 0.72x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=4096,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 397.8 Âµs / 407.0 Âµs | 444.29 ms | 206.57 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.048Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=4096,d=64 | `sklearn.linear_kernel` | ok | 68.43 ms / 69.31 ms | 66.06 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.048Ă—tol | 172.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=512,d=64 | `cupy.linear_kernel` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=512,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 293.4 Âµs / 335.5 Âµs | 86.75 ms | 671 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.026Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cpu | n=512,d=64 | `sklearn.linear_kernel` | ok | 562.7 Âµs / 573.5 Âµs | 1.04 ms | 671 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.026Ă—tol | 1.92x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=512,d=64 | `cupy.linear_kernel` | ok | 27.5 Âµs / 28.5 Âµs | 63.98 ms | 0.13 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.026Ă—tol | 0.25x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=512,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 111.7 Âµs / 114.0 Âµs | 181.78 ms | 74.45 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.026Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| linear_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=512,d=64 | `sklearn.linear_kernel` | ok | 560.1 Âµs / 567.1 Âµs | 1.24 ms | 0.13 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.026Ă—tol | 5.01x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `7159b33d` Â· nitrix `fcbe94d3`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:linear_kernel -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
